module.name: triangle
module.description: A labeled triangle (SVG): vertex labels, optional side labels, optional right-angle marker and angle arcs. Geometry illustration.
module.aiSpec:
A labeled TRIANGLE for geometry (SVG). Inline module with NO body — everything is set via params. Coordinates live in a 0–100 box where y grows DOWNWARD. Params: `points` — three "x,y" vertex coordinates, space-separated (three pairs) (default "12,85 88,85 62,15"), `labels` — vertex labels, comma-separated (default "A,B,C"), `sides` — side labels, comma-separated, in order AB,BC,CA (optional), `right` — vertex label that gets a right-angle square marker (optional), `marks` — vertex labels that get an angle arc, comma-separated (optional), `color` — line colour (default var(--accent-color)), `fill` — fill the triangle with a faint tint (default true; false = outline only), `strokewidth` — outline thickness in the 0–100 units (default "1.2"), `maxwidth` — rendered max width, any CSS length (default "340px").
<!-- @triangle points: 12,85 88,85 88,25, labels: A,B,C, sides: c,a,b, right: B, fill: false -->

param.name: points
param.label: Vertices (x,y ×3)
param.desc: Three space-separated x,y pairs in a 0-100 box (y grows downward), e.g. 12,85 88,85 62,15.

param.name: labels
param.label: Vertex labels
param.desc: Comma-separated labels for the three vertices, in point order.

param.name: sides
param.label: Side labels (AB,BC,CA)
param.desc: Comma-separated side labels in order AB, BC, CA (blank = none).

param.name: right
param.label: Right angle at
param.desc: Vertex label to mark with a right-angle square (blank = none).

param.name: marks
param.label: Angle arcs at
param.desc: Comma-separated vertex labels to mark with an angle arc (blank = none).

param.name: fill
param.label: Fill
param.desc: Fill the triangle with a faint tint (false = outline only).

param.name: strokewidth
param.label: Line thickness
param.desc: Outline thickness in the 0-100 coordinate units, e.g. 1.2.

param.name: maxwidth
param.label: Max width
param.desc: Rendered maximum width, any CSS length, e.g. 340px or 20em.

snippet.label: Right triangle
snippet.text: <!-- @triangle points: 12,85 88,85 88,25, labels: A,B,C, sides: c,a,b, right: B -->
snippet.description: Labeled triangle with side names and a right-angle marker.
